text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For today's training, Narita Taishin asks for help building her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I arrive at the gym, I see the stern athlete about to lift a
barbell.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, I've got this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She yanks it up, but the weight's momentum throws her off balance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So... heavy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I help hold the barbell and slowly lower it to the floor.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Gasp... Damn it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would probably be a good idea to warm up before she gets herself
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? You saying I can't handle it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That anyone as scrawny as me should just give up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's clear the irritated trainee has enough strength to lift the barbell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she needs to slow down and warm up properly first. I try to
explain why.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she appears reluctant, the stubborn student does as
instructed for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assign some light jogging on the treadmill to raise her body temp
and heart rate, then cap it off with stretching to loosen her muscles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished the comprehensive warm-up, Narita Taishin once
again stands before the barbell.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hgh... Hng!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time, she's a lot steadier, and she's able to lift the barbell with
no problem.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I did it!
choice_data_list: Looks like you've got the hang of it.
Looks like you've got the hang of it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A little, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her words express some doubt, but she's got it down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dumbbell training is going smoothly, but it could be better if I
adjusted her shaky posture...
choice_data_list:
Can you straighten out your upper body a little
more?

Can you straighten out your upper body a little
more?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I'll try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the training, she seems to take my instructions more
willingly than before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With the workout finished, I go over the day's accomplishments.
choice_data_list: How'd you feel with today's training?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um... Fine, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. Hey, um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I think I might wanna do that warm-up you showed me from now on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It made things... Well, my body felt easier to move, I think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't hide my excitement. I wasn't expecting such a positive
response from her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, what the heck... Chill out, would you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Are we done wrapping up? Cause I'm gonna split.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Though training seems to be going well with her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are still some obstacles to overcome before we can truly be
partners.
